title: ardisia garubahaya
intro: Ardisia garubahaya is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae, native to Sri Lanka, and is also known as 'Garubahaya' in Sinhala. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes. The herbal preparations of Ardisia garubahaya include decoctions and infusions, which are typically consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
